title: Zara's Sleepy Stars
synopsis: Little Zara gets ready for bed with help from her loving family, discovering the magic of nighttime stars and sweet dreams.

pages.text: Time for bed, little Zara! Mama picks up her sleepy girl. Zara yawns big.

illustration.description: A loving mother gently lifting Zara, a toddler with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes, in soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars in the background, gentle moonlight streaming through a window
illustration.alt: Mama lifting sleepy Zara with stars glowing softly in the background

pages.text: Papa helps Zara put on soft pajamas. Blue pajamas with tiny stars. So cozy!

illustration.description: Papa helping Zara, who has natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes, put on star-patterned pajamas in soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, floating clouds around them, ethereal atmosphere with pastel palette
illustration.alt: Papa helping Zara into star pajamas with dreamy clouds floating nearby

pages.text: Grandma brushes Zara's hair gently. Soft, soft puffs. Zara feels loved.

illustration.description: Grandma tenderly brushing the hair of Zara, who has natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes, in soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars twinkling above them, round sleepy faces, gentle moonlight
illustration.alt: Grandma gently brushing Zara's coily hair with twinkling stars overhead

pages.text: Big sister reads a story. Zara listens and smiles. The stars outside twinkle.

illustration.description: Big sister reading a book to Zara, who has natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes, both sitting together in soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars visible through a window, floating clouds, ethereal atmosphere
illustration.alt: Big sister reading to Zara while stars twinkle outside the window

pages.text: Mama sings a lullaby. Papa kisses Zara's forehead. Grandma tucks her in tight.

illustration.description: Family gathered around Zara's bed as she lies down, Zara with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes, in soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars above, round sleepy faces on all family members, gentle moonlight, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Loving family tucking sleepy Zara into bed with glowing stars above

pages.text: Night-night, sweet Zara. Dream of stars and love. Family hugs forever.

illustration.description: Zara peacefully sleeping in her bed with natural coily hair in two puffs, deep brown skin, sparkling dark brown eyes closed in sleep, in soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars surrounding her like a magical blanket, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette
illustration.alt: Zara sleeping peacefully surrounded by magical glowing stars and dreamy clouds

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: Who helps Zara get ready for bed?
questions.explanation: Zara's whole family helps her get ready for bed - Mama, Papa, Grandma, and big sister all take turns helping her.

questions.question: What do the family members do to help Zara sleep?
questions.explanation: The family sings lullabies, gives kisses, and tucks Zara in tight to help her fall asleep peacefully.

questions.question: What does Zara see outside her window?
questions.explanation: Zara sees beautiful twinkling stars outside her window as she gets ready for bed at nighttime.
